name: Hidden Valley Ranch Chicken Stir-Fry
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add chicken breast strips to the skillet and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
3. Stir in one package Hidden Valley Original Ranch Salad Dressing Mix.
4. Add thawed vegetable medley and water to the skillet.
5. Stir-fry for about 2 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender and well coated with the dressing.
